scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Michigan recommends a general college-preparatory program. Its official Common Data Set lists 16 required academic units, 23+ recommended units, and specifically recommends rigorous coursework such as IB, AP, A Levels, honors, advanced, accelerated, and enriched classes.
areas.detail: Michigan recommends a general college-preparatory program. Its official Common Data Set lists 16 required academic units, 23+ recommended units, and specifically recommends rigorous coursework such as IB, AP, A Levels, honors, advanced, accelerated, and enriched classes.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Michigan’s official Common Data Set marks recommendations as important in first-year admissions review.
areas.detail: Michigan’s official Common Data Set marks recommendations as important in first-year admissions review.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Michigan’s official Common Data Set marks the application essay as important in first-year admissions review.
areas.detail: Michigan’s official Common Data Set marks the application essay as important in first-year admissions review.
